response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior software developer with excellent communication and DevOps skills, but lacks both primary mandatory qualifications: only ~6 months of documented C++ experience (versus required 5-10 years), no Windows platform background, and zero domain knowledge in capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking. The entire career trajectory is in web development, data platforms, and GIS systems—fundamentally misaligned with financial systems development.
strengths: Appropriate mid-senior seniority with 15+ years of professional experience and multiple Staff/Senior roles
Excellent communication and teaching ability demonstrated through workshops, talks, and technical mentoring
Strong DevOps, CI/CD, and infrastructure knowledge with hands-on Docker, Kubernetes, and deployment pipeline experience
concerns: Severe gap in core requirement: only ~6 months of C++ professional experience versus 5-10 years required, with no Windows platform development mentioned
Complete absence of financial services domain knowledge—no capital markets, fixed income, derivatives, or investment banking exposure whatsoever
SQL experience vague and generic in resume; no mention of SQL Server or Oracle expertise critical for the role

key_factors.factor: C++ experience depth and Windows platform background
